nasb.text: For I have set My face against this city for harm and not for good,” declares the Lord. “It will be given into the hand of the king of Babylon and he will burn it with fire.” ’

esv.text: For I have set my face against this city for harm and not for good, declares the Lord: it shall be given into the hand of the king of Babylon, and he shall burn it with fire.’

cnv.text: 因為我已經決意向這城降禍不降福；這城必交在巴比倫王的手中，他必放火把城燒毀。’”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 我必严惩这城，向它降祸不降福。它必落在巴比伦王手中，被付之一炬。这是耶和华说的。’
